campaigns.title: Vitamin D & B12 supplements for chronic fatigue
campaigns.description: Ongoing supplements prescribed by my doctor to manage fatigue and low energy. Looking for help covering 6 months of costs.
campaigns.about_me: I'm a single parent working full-time. Managing fatigue has been a long journey and these supplements have made a real difference.

campaigns.title: Physical therapy for chronic back pain
campaigns.description: Funding 12 sessions of PT to avoid surgery. My insurance only covers 6; I need the rest to get back to work.
campaigns.about_me: Construction worker, 48. Back injury last year. PT has already helped—I just need to finish the program.

campaigns.title: CGM and glucose monitoring supplies
campaigns.description: Continuous glucose monitor and test strips for 3 months. My insurance changed and no longer covers the full amount.
campaigns.about_me: Type 2 diabetic, 34. CGM has helped me avoid spikes and stay on track. Grateful for any support.

campaigns.title: Post-surgery rehab and mobility aids
campaigns.description: Knee replacement recovery: home exercises, follow-up PT, and a few mobility aids to get back on my feet safely.
campaigns.about_me: Retired teacher. Surgery went well; now I need to do the rehab right so I can walk without pain again.

campaigns.title: Mental health counseling copays
campaigns.description: Covering copays for 10 therapy sessions. My therapist has been essential for managing anxiety and I don’t want to pause now.
campaigns.about_me: Working on my mental health after a tough year. Every bit helps me stay consistent with care.
